products.name: THE TIKHI Traditional Homemade Aaloo Ka Achar - 500g
products.description: A classic homemade Indian potato pickle made in small batches using traditional methods. Potatoes are slow-cooked and infused with a bold blend of whole spices and mustard oil for a spicy, tangy, savoury flavour. 100% vegetarian, with no artificial flavours or preservatives.
products.ingredients: Potato, Mustard Oil, Salt, Red Chilli Powder, Fennel Seeds, Dry Mango Powder, Tamarind, Green Chilli
